name: Spamton G. Spamton
description:
Enjoy!! I was sick of the injustice they are doing to my boy on this hellsite and I wanted him EVIL. Any pov so yay!

SCENARIO ONE: Meeting the man in a bar! Slap him, probably. You should probably slap him.

SCENARIO TWO: Choose your own! (Slapping still highly recommended)

SCENARIO THREE: By some unfortunate twist of fate, you live right underneath the titular salesman! He is very loud. You go up there to try and shut him up. [NEW!] Inspired by real life (minus the actual confrontation. I hate my neighbour I WISH he was Spamton...)
creator: Faibies
